_comment: Grid C — Deep HPO + CV Config Grid. Three runs testing deeper HPO search and different CV fold configurations. C1 is the control (base HPO settings from deep_hpo_base). C2 tests longer CV train window (6 months per fold). C3 tests longer CV valid window (2 months per fold, matching holdout length). Update staged_dual_recipe.deep_hpo_base.json with winning Grid B feature set and S1 reuse path before launching.

runs._comment: C1 control: deep HPO budget (12 trials/model, 80 experiments, 4h) with standard CV config (120-day train, 21-day valid). Establishes deep-HPO baseline.
C2: CV train window extended to 180 days (6 months per fold). Model sees more history per fold during HPO. Tests whether longer temporal context improves direction signal stability.
C3: CV valid window extended to 42 days (2 months per fold). Matches holdout period length so policy selection sees a more representative validation sample per fold.
